title: National Action Plan (RENAKSI) 2025–2030 for Blue Carbon Ecosystems
description: Targets protection of ~3.45M ha mangroves and ~660K ha seagrass; ~17% of global blue carbon.

title: PR 110/2025 — Nilai Ekonomi Karbon (Carbon Economic Value)
description: Replaces PR 98/2021. Covers CA mechanism, ITMO authorization, SRUK registry, 2026–30 carbon allocation ceilings.

title: Global Carbon Council Mutual Recognition Agreement
SIDAKO Ocean Accounting (KKP)
description: Marine/coastal ecosystem accounting platform; underpins seagrass NDC integration.
